label: PASS
rationale: RangeStart is column 0x03 of the Locking table and has type uinteger_8; a boolean true token is not a numeric uinteger value, so rejecting the CreateRow with INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: RangeStart is specified as uinteger_8 and defines LBA geometry; accepting a CreateRow where RangeStart is boolean true treats a boolean token as a valid uinteger, contrary to the provided rule.

label: PASS
rationale: RangeLength is column 0x04 of the Locking table and has type uinteger_8; a boolean false token is not a numeric uinteger value, so rejecting the CreateRow with INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: RangeLength is specified as uinteger_8 and defines the quantity of contiguous LBAs; accepting a CreateRow where RangeLength is boolean false treats a boolean token as a valid uinteger, contrary to the provided rule.

label: PASS
rationale: RangeStart remains a uinteger_8 column when modified by Set, and changes are subject to the same creation constraints; rejecting a Set of boolean false for RangeStart is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: RangeStart is a uinteger_8 LBA value, and Set processing for non-Global rows preserves the RangeStart constraints; accepting boolean false as the new RangeStart is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: RangeLength remains a uinteger_8 column when modified by Set, and changes are subject to the same creation constraints; rejecting a Set of boolean true for RangeLength is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: RangeLength is a uinteger_8 LBA count, and Set processing for non-Global rows preserves the RangeLength constraints; accepting boolean true as the new RangeLength is not compliant.
